name: Quick & Chewy Chocolate Drops
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Hershey's semi-sweet baking chocolate, broken into pieces
1/4 cup butter or margarine, softened (1/2 stick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, microwave chocolate for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until melted when stirred. Allow it to cool slightly.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter and sugar until well blended.
4. Add egg and vanilla extract; beat well.
5. Blend in the melted chocolate, flour, and baking powder. Stir in nuts if desired.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until nearly set.
8. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
About 2 dozen cookies.
